backend/main.mo: Main actor module defining all data types (Vehicle, Variant, Color, BlogPost, Promotion, Testimonial, Visit, etc.) and including mixins for blob storage and authorization with access control state initialization and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module providing a run function that handles schema changes between old and new actor states, currently passing through the old state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and layouts describing their functionality and data flow.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with public routes (Beranda, Mobil Keluarga/Niaga, Promo, Blog, Kontak, Simulasi Kredit) and auth-guarded admin routes, wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog component for creating and editing admin users with form fields for name, email, and principal ID (create only), using mutation hooks and toast notifications for success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component displaying admin users with edit and delete actions, showing loading skeletons during fetch, empty state when no users exist, and disabling delete for the last remaining admin.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: A dialog component for selecting banner images from media assets, filtering for images with 'banner' in the filename and displaying them in a radio-group grid with preview thumbnails using blob URLs.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: A form dialog for creating and editing blog posts with title, excerpt, and content fields, including delegation identity validation and token expiry checking before submission.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: A table component displaying all blog posts with edit, delete, and publish/unpublish toggle actions, including confirmation dialogs for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: A grid component displaying media assets with thumbnails (using blob URLs from canister data), copy ID and delete actions, including delegation identity validation before deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: A drag-and-drop file upload component supporting images (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP) and PDFs with size validation, progress tracking, and delegation identity validation before upload.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: Dialog component for creating and editing passenger vehicles with form fields for vehicle name, description, and base price. Uses custom hooks for create/update mutations and manages form state with validation.
Table component displaying all vehicles with edit, delete, and publish status toggle actions. Includes confirmation dialog for deletions and loading/empty states.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: Dialog component for creating and editing promotions with fields for title, description, start date, and end date. Handles date conversion to/from nanosecond timestamps for backend compatibility.
Table component displaying all promotions with period dates, active status toggle, edit and delete actions. Includes confirmation dialog for deletions and formatted date display.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Dialog component for creating and editing testimonials with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1-5). Validates rating range and manages timestamp generation for new testimonials.
Table component displaying all testimonials with customer name, content preview, star rating visualization, and edit/delete actions. Includes loading and empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Displays a horizontal bar chart of the top 10 most visited pages using Recharts, with loading and empty states. Converts bigint data to chart format, truncates long URLs for display, and shows full URLs in tooltips.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart showing visitor trends over the last 30 days using Recharts. Converts bigint timestamp data to formatted dates and includes loading/empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that validates Internet Identity delegation, checks for anonymous principals, and redirects to login if identity is missing or expired, showing loading state during initialization.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a list of 5 hardcoded recent articles with icons, each clickable to navigate to the blog post detail page using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom navigation bar with call, WhatsApp, credit simulation, and menu buttons. Includes a dropdown menu overlay with site navigation links that closes on outside click.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Provides a button group to select vehicle variants, automatically selecting the first variant on mount and notifying parent component of selection changes via callback.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Displays a CTA banner image loaded from media assets or falls back to a static generated image. Creates blob URLs from canister data and handles cleanup on unmount.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer with company info, contact details, social media links, operating hours, and real-time visitor statistics that auto-refresh every 15 seconds. Includes copyright and developer attribution.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Dynamic hero banner that displays different titles, icons, backgrounds, and subtexts based on the current pathname. Handles family vehicles, commercial vehicles, promo, testimonials, blog, contact, and credit simulation pages.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Displays a carousel of up to 8 family vehicles from the catalog using a responsive carousel component with navigation controls.
Displays a carousel of up to 8 commercial vehicles ('Mobil Niaga') fetched from vehicle catalogs, with loading state and navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the main banner image, loading it from media assets by filename or falling back to a static generated image, with blob URL management and error handling.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop menu links, and mobile hamburger menu with click-outside-to-close functionality for public site navigation.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Provides like and share buttons for vehicle products with counters, integrating native share API when available.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of up to 4 featured vehicles ('Produk Unggulan') from vehicle catalogs with loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: Search input component that redirects to the family vehicles page with a search query parameter when submitted.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section displaying three key features (flexible installments, low down payment, negotiable price) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang dealership and its services.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector for vehicle variants and colors with button groups, managing selection state and notifying parent component of changes.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying vehicle image, name, base price, and detail link with formatted Indonesian currency.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian language labels, validation messages, and user feedback messages for the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: React Query hook for fetching admin dashboard statistics (vehicles, contacts, visitors, etc.), currently returning default values as backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on admin users with authentication and network error handling. Currently returns stubs/empty data as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for managing blog posts (fetch, create, update, delete) with error handling and toast notifications. Backend methods are stubbed and return empty arrays/null.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on commercial vehicle categories. All backend methods are stubbed and return empty data or log warnings.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting contact form data. Backend method is stubbed with a console warning.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch all contact submissions. Backend method is stubbed and returns an empty array.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting credit simulation data. Backend method is stubbed with a console warning.
Provides a query hook to fetch all credit simulations. Backend method is stubbed and returns an empty array.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for managing media assets with comprehensive error handling (auth, network, canister stopped). Includes fetch, create, update, and delete operations with retry logic and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides React Query hooks for product like/share counts and actions. All backend methods are stubbed and return default values (BigInt(0)).
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: React Query hooks for managing promotions (create, update, delete, get all) with error handling for auth and network issues. Currently returns stub data as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: React Query hooks for fetching public vehicle catalog data. Returns empty arrays/null as backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hook for fetching website settings. Returns null as backend implementation is pending.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: React Query hooks for CRUD operations on testimonials with error classification (auth/network). Currently stubbed with placeholder data pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: React Query hooks for vehicle CRUD operations with enhanced error handling and toast notifications. Returns stub data until backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: React Query hooks for fetching visitor statistics, trends, and page views. Only getVisitorStats is enabled; other endpoints are disabled pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that now logs a deprecation notice. Actual tracking is handled by PublicLayout component.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: React Query hooks for getting and updating website settings with error handling. Returns stub data until backend implements the methods.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors including sidebar, charts, and UI component tokens.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin layout component with collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile behavior, and logout functionality. Includes menu items for dashboard, vehicles, promo, testimonials, blog, media, leads, statistics, settings, and admin users.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout wrapper that includes Navbar, conditional HeroSection, Footer, and BottomCTABar. Implements visitor tracking on page navigation using session IDs, device detection, and browser fingerprinting.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component.
Admin user management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and delete functionality using Principal-based authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Blog post management page with list view and add/edit dialog, invalidating React Query cache on successful operations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder page for commercial vehicles management that currently redirects users to the family vehicles section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Displays a sortable table of credit simulation submissions from visitors, showing vehicle ID, amount, tenor, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard displaying statistics cards for passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and total visitors with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Displays a sortable table of contact form submissions from the website, showing name, email, message, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Media management page with upload zone and asset grid, invalidating React Query cache after successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles (Mobil Keluarga) with add/edit functionality via dialog and list display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with add/edit functionality via dialog and list display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add/edit/delete functionality, including confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin dashboard displaying visitor statistics with auto-refresh (15s), showing metrics like total visitors, daily/weekly/monthly counts, online users, and charts for trends and top pages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for configuring website settings including site name, contact info, social media URLs, operational hours, and banner images with image picker components.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity authentication with loading states, error handling, and automatic redirect to admin dashboard upon successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage composing multiple sections: main banner, vehicle highlights (family/commercial), CTA banner, about us, features, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for blog article details, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for blog listing, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form collecting customer details (name, address, phone, email, vehicle interest, down payment, tenor, message) and submitting via contact form hook.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Public detail page for a passenger vehicle, displaying vehicle info, price, variant/color selector, product interactions, and tabs for specifications and features.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public listing page displaying up to 8 published passenger vehicles in a grid layout using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Displays a grid of commercial vehicles filtered by category slug from URL params. Shows loading state and renders up to 8 published vehicles using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Detailed vehicle page showing images, pricing, variant selector, specifications, and features in tabs. Includes product interactions and action buttons for contacting sales, credit simulation, and brochure download.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Landing page for commercial vehicles showing three category cards (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) that navigate to category-specific pages when clicked.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page displaying a message that the promo section is under development and directing users to contact sales.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form that calculates estimated monthly installments based on vehicle selection, down payment, and tenor. Submits simulation requests and displays real-time payment calculations.
Placeholder page displaying a message that the testimonial section is under development.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: TypeScript type definitions for frontend use that mirror backend types including Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleImage, Specification, Feature, Promotion, Testimonial, BlogPost, MediaAsset, WebsiteSettings, AdminUser, ContactSubmission, CreditSimulation, VisitorStats, and CommercialVehicleCategory.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Utility functions for converting MediaAsset Uint8Array blob data from canister storage into browser-displayable blob URLs and determining asset types (image, PDF) from MIME types.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Calculates monthly loan installments using an 8% annual interest rate based on vehicle price, down payment, and tenor (loan term in months).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for extracting URL parameters from query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and functions to clear sensitive parameters from the URL.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides validation functions for form inputs (email, phone, URL, numeric, length) and delegation identity authentication, returning error messages in Indonesian or null if valid.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Utility functions for visitor tracking including session ID generation/retrieval, device type detection, browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for borders/shadows/animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document defining a media management application with pending feature requests to implement persistent admin user storage and role-based authorization for delete operations instead of hardcoded principals.
